About StudentBridge

StudentBridge is a full-stack career platform designed to connect students with companies using AI-powered tools, smart job matching, and structured learning paths.

🎯 Mission

Help students transition from education to employment through real-world tools and AI guidance.

⚙️ Features

  • AI Career Advisor
  • Smart Job Matching
  • CV Analyzer
  • Learning Hub
  • Mentorship System

🧠 Tech Stack

React.js, Node.js, Express, MySQL, JWT, Socket.io, AI APIs (GROQ)

Join Now
); }
